mapper.select:
select distinct fs.special_id as projectId, tt.topic_name, fs.color_type, fs.special_name as projectName, fs.trial_id, ts.name speciesName, ts.name_en speciesNameEn, fs.status, fs.create_time, fs.create_by, su.nick_name as createName, fs.principal, user.nick_name principalName, fs.update_time, fs.update_time as recoveryTime from fr_special fs left join tb_topic tt on fs.topic_id = tt.topic_id left join sys_user su on fs.create_by = su.user_id left join sys_user user on fs.principal = user.user_id left join tb_species ts on fs.species_id = ts.species_id left join fr_special_member fsm on fs.special_id = fsm.special_id and fsm.del_flag = '0' and ts.organization_id = #{params.organizationId} where fs.del_flag = #{params.delFlag} and fs.organization_id = #{params.organizationId} and fs.is_permanent_del = 0
and tt.topic_name like concat('%', #{params.topicName}, '%')
and fs.special_name like concat('%', #{params.projectName}, '%')
and fs.trial_id = #{params.trialId}
and fsm.user_id = #{params.userId}
and fs.species_id = #{params.speciesId}
-- 创建状态集合查询条件
and fs.status in
#{item}
and fs.color_type = #{params.colorType}
and user.user_name like concat('%', #{params.principalName}, '%')
AND date_format(fs.create_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.createTimeParams.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(fs.create_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.createTimeParams.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(fs.update_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.recoveryTimeParams.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(fs.update_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.recoveryTimeParams.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(fs.update_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.expireTimeParams.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(fs.update_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.expireTimeParams.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by fs.create_time desc
